name: MK-84 Mechanical Keyboard with Custom Matte Keycaps
description: Experience the ultimate typing feel with the Kepler MK-84. Featuring custom matte keycaps, hot-swappable switches, and a solid aluminum chassis. Designed for both productivity and gaming enthusiasts who appreciate tactile feedback without the noise. The 84-key layout saves space without compromising functionality.

name: Chronos Minimalist Wristwatch with Leather Strap
description: The Chronos wristwatch embodies the less-is-more philosophy. Its clean face, free from unnecessary complications, ensures readability at a glance. Paired with a premium top-grain leather strap that ages beautifully, this watch is a timeless piece for any wardrobe.

name: Brutalist Concrete Portable Wireless Speaker
description: A striking blend of raw industrial design and cutting-edge acoustic engineering. The Vou concrete speaker delivers deep bass and crystal-clear highs. The dense concrete enclosure minimizes resonance, providing a purer sound, while the rechargeable battery offers up to 12 hours of playtime.

name: Artisan Matte Cast Iron Dutch Oven (5.5 Qt)
description: Master slow-cooked stews, braises, and sourdough bread with this heirloom-quality Dutch oven. The matte enamel interior resists staining and chipping, while the heavy cast iron construction ensures even heat distribution and retention. Compatible with all stovetops.

name: Zenith Noise-Cancelling Wireless Earbuds
description: Block out the world and dive into your music. The Zenith earbuds feature active noise cancellation, a transparent mode for awareness, and water resistance for active lifestyles. The compact charging case provides up to 24 hours of total listening time.

name: Smart Ambient Table Lamp with App Control
description: Set the perfect mood with millions of colors and adjustable color temperatures. The Lumina smart lamp integrates seamlessly with your smart home ecosystem. Control it via the companion app or voice commands to create custom lighting schedules.

name: Premium Cotton Percale Sheet Set - Queen
description: Crisp, cool, and breathable. These 100% long-staple cotton percale sheets get softer with every wash. Designed for hot sleepers, the set includes a fitted sheet with deep pockets, a flat sheet, and two pillowcases.

name: Hydrating Botanical Serum with Hyaluronic Acid
description: Revitalize your skin with this lightweight, fast-absorbing botanical serum. Packed with hyaluronic acid and antioxidant-rich plant extracts, it deeply hydrates, plumps fine lines, and leaves your complexion glowing and refreshed.

name: Weekend Canvas Duffle Bag
description: The perfect companion for short getaways. Made from heavy-duty water-resistant canvas with full-grain leather accents, this duffle features a spacious main compartment, internal organization pockets, and a dedicated shoe compartment.

name: Ceramic Essential Oil Diffuser
description: Transform your space into a tranquil retreat. This elegant ceramic diffuser uses ultrasonic technology to disperse a fine mist of water and essential oils. Features an optional soft LED light and multiple timer settings.

name: Blue Light Blocking Glasses - Tortoiseshell
description: Protect your eyes from digital strain without compromising on style. The Clarity glasses feature premium CR-39 lenses with advanced blue light filtering and anti-glare coatings, set in a classic tortoiseshell acetate frame.

name: Organic Matcha Green Tea Powder - Ceremonial Grade
description: Experience the vibrant color and smooth, umami-rich flavor of our ceremonial grade matcha. Sourced directly from family-owned farms in Uji, Japan, and stone-ground to order for maximum freshness and antioxidant benefits.
